inputs.description: Sauna name (must match SaunaName in csvs/sauna_info.csv). Use ALL (or leave blank) to scrape everything.

tasks.label: Sauna: setup (install deps + Playwright Chromium)
args: set -euo pipefail; if ! command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1; then if command -v brew >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Installing GitHub CLI (gh) via Homebrew..."; brew install gh; else echo "Error: GitHub CLI (gh) is not installed and Homebrew (brew) was not found."; echo "Install gh: https://cli.github.com/"; exit 1; fi; fi; ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/loadNodeVersion npm ci && ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/loadNodeVersion npx playwright install chromium

tasks.label: Sauna: scrape booking data (prompt for sauna)
args: SAUNA="${input:saunaName}"; if [[ -z "$SAUNA" || "$SAUNA" == "ALL" ]]; then ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/loadNodeVersion npm run scrape:booking-data; else ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/loadNodeVersion npm run scrape:booking-data -- --sauna "$SAUNA"; fi

tasks.label: Sauna: generate opening times weekly (3-week heuristic)
Sauna: update (sync csvs + scrape booking data + push bookings to database)
Sauna: update via GitHub Action + pull DB from data branch
args: set -euo pipefail; if command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1; then :; else echo "Error: GitHub CLI (gh) is not installed."; echo "Install: brew install gh (or https://cli.github.com/)"; exit 1; fi; if gh auth status -h github.com >/dev/null 2>&1; then :; else echo "Error: gh is installed but not authenticated."; echo "Run: gh auth login"; exit 1; fi; OUT=$(gh workflow run "Hourly Update" 2>&1 | tee /dev/stderr); echo "Triggered workflow. Waiting for completion..."; RUN_ID=$(printf '%s' "$OUT" | grep -oE '(gh run view [0-9]+|actions/runs/[0-9]+)' | tail -n 1 | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | tail -n 1); if [[ -z "$RUN_ID" ]]; then echo "Error: Could not determine the run id from gh output."; echo "Try: gh run list"; exit 1; fi; echo "Watching run $RUN_ID"; gh run watch "$RUN_ID" --exit-status; git fetch origin data; git checkout origin/data -- sauna_bookings.sqlite
